mapper.select:
SELECT c1.business_type As businessType, c1.contract_no As sellContractNo, c1.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, ROUND(r.buy_price * r.deal_number,2) As buyAmount, ROUND(r.sell_price * r.deal_number,2) As sellAmount, ROUND((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number,2) As profit, (c1.dealed_amount-c1.refund_amount) as dealedAmount, ROUND((c1.total_amount-c1.dealed_amount-c1.refund_amount)*r.deal_number/c1.total_number,2) As notReceive, c1.interest_amount as receiveInterest, r.buy_user_name As buyUserName, r.sell_user_name As sellUserName, IF(((c1.dealed_amount-c1.refund_amount)=c1.total_amount),(SELECT MAX(re.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive re WHERE re.contract_id = c1.id AND re.status = 'D'),null) As lastReceiveTime, IF(((c2.dealed_amount-c2.refund_amount)=c2.total_amount),(SELECT MAX(ap.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay ap WHERE ap.contract_id = c2.id AND ap.status = 'D'),null) As lastPayTime, IFNULL(c1.pay_full_time,(SELECT DATE_ADD(s.delivery_time,INTERVAL s.credit_days DAY) FROM t_apply_sell s WHERE s.contract_id = c1.id)) As sellPayFullTime, c2.pay_full_time As buyPayFullTime, c1.total_number As sellTotalNumber, c2.total_number As buyTotalNumber, r.deal_number As dealNumber, r.buy_price As buyDealPrice, r.sell_price As sellDealPrice, IFNULL(c2.transport_amount,0) As buyTransportAmount, IFNULL(c2.warehouse_amount,0) As buyWarehouseAmount, IFNULL(c1.transport_amount,0) As sellTransportAmount, IFNULL(c1.warehouse_amount,0) As sellWarehouseAmount, IFNULL(c1.interest_amount,0) As sellInterestAmount, c2.interest_amount As buyInterestAmount, DATEDIFF((IFNULL((SELECT MAX(re.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive re WHERE re.contract_id = c1.id AND re.status ='D'),NOW())),c1.pay_full_time) As orverdurDay, IFNULL((SELECT SUM(pf.cc_fee_cg+pf.cc_fee_qt+pf.cc_fee_ruku+pf.cc_fee_xs+pf.wl_fee_dfcc+pf.wl_fee_ys+pf.wl_fee_zc+pf.wl_fee_qt) FROM t_ctr_product_fee pf,t_apply_delivery d WHERE pf.apply_delivery_id=d.id AND d.operation = '0' AND pf.contract_id = c1.id),0) As realTranAndWarehouseAmount, IFNULL(DATEDIFF(IFNULL(c1.pay_full_time,(SELECT DATE_ADD(s.delivery_time,INTERVAL s.credit_days DAY) FROM t_apply_sell s WHERE s.contract_id = c1.id)),c2.pay_full_time),0) As creditDays, (SELECT MAX(r.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r WHERE r.contract_id = c1.id AND r.`status` = 'D') As maxReceiveDate, (SELECT MAX(p.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p WHERE p.contract_id = c2.id AND p.`status` = 'D') As maxPayDate, IFNULL((SELECT SUM((DATEDIFF((SELECT MAX(r2.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r2 WHERE r2.contract_id = c1.id AND r2.`status` = 'D'),ar.receive_date))*ar.receive_amount) FROM t_apply_receive ar WHERE ar.contract_id = c1.id AND ar.`status` = 'D'),0) As sellInterest, IFNULL((SELECT SUM((DATEDIFF((SELECT MAX(p2.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p2 WHERE p2.contract_id = c2.id AND p2.`status` = 'D'),ap.pay_date))*ap.pay_amount) FROM t_apply_pay ap WHERE ap.contract_id = c2.id AND ap.`status` = 'D'),0) As buyInterest, IF(IFNULL(ROUND((SELECT SUM(DATEDIFF(tr.receive_date,(IFNULL(c1.pay_full_time,(SELECT DATE_ADD(s.delivery_time,INTERVAL s.credit_days DAY) FROM t_apply_sell s WHERE s.contract_id = c1.id))))*(r.deal_number/c1.total_number)*tr.receive_amount*0.001) FROM t_apply_receive tr WHERE tr.contract_id = c1.id AND tr.status = 'D'),2),0)<0,0,IFNULL(ROUND((SELECT SUM(DATEDIFF(tr.receive_date,(IFNULL(c1.pay_full_time,(SELECT DATE_ADD(s.delivery_time,INTERVAL s.credit_days DAY) FROM t_apply_sell s WHERE s.contract_id = c1.id))))*(r.deal_number/c1.total_number)*tr.receive_amount*0.001) FROM t_apply_receive tr WHERE tr.contract_id = c1.id AND tr.status = 'D'),2),0)) AS interestAmount FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.sell_contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON r.buy_contract_id = c2.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a1 ON a1.ctr_contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a2 ON a2.ctr_contract_id = c2.id WHERE c1.contract_status != 'C' AND c1.business_type != '' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c1.contract_type = 'S'
ORDER BY c1.id DESC

SELECT SUM(ROUND(r.sell_price * r.deal_number,2)) As sellAmount, SUM(ROUND((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number,2)) As profit, SUM(ROUND(((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)-(IF((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number*0.12884956 < 0,(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003),((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)*0.12884956+(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003)))-((r.buy_price*r.deal_number)*(DATEDIFF(IFNULL((SELECT MAX(r.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r WHERE r.contract_id = c1.id),NOW()),IFNULL((SELECT MAX(p.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p WHERE p.contract_id = c2.id),NOW())))*0.0002)-(IFNULL(c2.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(c2.warehouse_amount,0)/1.06)-(IFNULL(c1.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(f.fee_amount) FROM t_ctr_contract_fee f where f.contract_id = c1.id),0)+((p.warehouse_number-r.deal_number)*p.warehouse_price*(DATEDIFF(NOW(),(SELECT sc.created_date FROM t_stock_contract sc WHERE sc.id = r.stock_contract_id)))),0)/1.06),2)) As margin, SUM(ROUND((((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)-(IF((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number*0.12884956 < 0,(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003),((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)*0.12884956+(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003)))-((r.buy_price*r.deal_number)*(DATEDIFF(IFNULL((SELECT MAX(r.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r WHERE r.contract_id = c1.id),NOW()),IFNULL((SELECT MAX(p.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p WHERE p.contract_id = c2.id),NOW())))*0.0002)-(IFNULL(c2.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(c2.warehouse_amount,0)/1.06)-(IFNULL(c1.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(f.fee_amount) FROM t_ctr_contract_fee f where f.contract_id = c1.id),0)+((p.warehouse_number-r.deal_number)*p.warehouse_price*(DATEDIFF(NOW(),(SELECT sc.created_date FROM t_stock_contract sc WHERE sc.id = r.stock_contract_id)))),0)/1.06))/(r.deal_number*r.buy_price)*365/(DATEDIFF(c1.pay_full_time,c2.pay_full_time)),2)) As earnings, SUM(ROUND((((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)-(IF((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number*0.12884956 < 0,(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003),((r.sell_price-r.buy_price)*r.deal_number)*0.12884956+(r.deal_number*r.sell_price*0.0003)))-((r.buy_price*r.deal_number)*(DATEDIFF(IFNULL((SELECT MAX(r.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r WHERE r.contract_id = c1.id),NOW()),IFNULL((SELECT MAX(p.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p WHERE p.contract_id = c2.id),NOW())))*0.0002)-(IFNULL(c2.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(c2.warehouse_amount,0)/1.06)-(IFNULL(c1.transport_amount,0)/1.09+IFNULL(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(f.fee_amount) FROM t_ctr_contract_fee f where f.contract_id = c1.id),0)+((p.warehouse_number-r.deal_number)*p.warehouse_price*(DATEDIFF(NOW(),(SELECT sc.created_date FROM t_stock_contract sc WHERE sc.id = r.stock_contract_id)))),0)/1.06))/(r.deal_number*r.buy_price)*365/(DATEDIFF(IFNULL((SELECT MAX(r.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive r WHERE r.contract_id = c1.id),NOW()),IFNULL((SELECT MAX(p.pay_date) FROM t_apply_pay p WHERE p.contract_id = c2.id),NOW()))),2)) As realEarnings, SUM(ROUND((c1.total_amount-c1.dealed_amount)*r.deal_number/c1.total_number,2)) As notReceive FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON r.sell_contract_id = c1.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON r.buy_contract_id = c2.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE c1.contract_status != 'C' AND c1.business_type != '' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
